name: setColor
description: Sets the color of highlight markers. Markers are displayed as rotating cross symbols that draw attention to specific points on the sky.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color created with core.vec3f(r, g, b) where r,g,b range 0.0-1.0

name: getColor
description: Returns the current color of highlight markers as an RGB array [R, G, B].
returnDescription: RGB color array [R, G, B] where each component ranges 0.0-1.0

name: setMarkersSize
description: Sets the size of highlight markers in pixels. Larger markers are more visible, smaller markers are more subtle.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Marker size in pixels (default: 11.0, recommended range: 5-25)

name: getMarkersSize
description: Returns the current size of highlight markers in pixels.
example:
var size = HighlightMgr.getMarkersSize();
core.debug('Current marker size: ' + size + ' pixels');

name: addPoint
description: Adds a highlight marker at the specified J2000 equatorial coordinates. Markers are visual indicators used to draw attention to specific points on the celestial sphere.

name: addPointRaDec
description: Adds a highlight marker using Right Ascension and Declination coordinates for the current date (not J2000). The coordinates are automatically converted to the J2000 reference frame.

parameters.name: ra
parameters.description: Right Ascension for the current date (e.g., '5h 35m 17.3s')

name: addPointAltAzi
description: Adds a highlight marker using Altitude and Azimuth coordinates (horizon-based). The coordinates are automatically converted to the J2000 equatorial reference frame.

parameters.name: alt
parameters.description: Altitude angle (e.g., '45°', '90°' for zenith, '0°' for horizon)

parameters.name: azi
parameters.description: Azimuth angle (e.g., '0°' for North, '90°' for East, '180°' for South)

name: cleanHighlightList
description: Removes all highlight markers from the sky. Clears the entire highlight list.

name: fillHighlightList
description: Replaces the current list of highlight markers with a new list of J2000 coordinates. All existing highlights are cleared and replaced with the provided list.

parameters.name: list
parameters.description: List of J2000 position vectors as normalized 3D vectors

compatibility.notes: Public method, not a slot, but callable from scripts
